rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE MARION L. FRANCOIS LIVING TRUST
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Respondent Carol Francois To Respond To Form Interrogatories, And For Award Of Monetary Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: The motion to compel responses to form interrogatories is denied because respondent has responded. Because petitioners should not have had to file the motion to secure responses, sanctions are awarded against respondent in the amount of $835 to compensate for reasonable fees and costs incurred in bringing the motion. Any party wishing to contest this tentative ruling by appearing at the scheduled hearing must so advise other parties and the courtroom clerk (415-551-3702) no later than 4:00 p.m. Wednesday, July 18, 2018.

rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE MARION L. FRANCOIS LIVING TRUST
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Respondent Carol Francois To Respond To Form Interrogatories, And For Award Of Monetary Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: [Duplicate Ruling] The motion to compel responses to form interrogatories is denied because respondent has responded. Because petitioners should not have had to file the motion to secure responses, sanctions are awarded against respondent in the amount of $835 to compensate for reasonable fees and costs incurred in bringing the motion. Any party wishing to contest this tentative ruling by appearing at the scheduled hearing must so advise other parties and the courtroom clerk (415-551-3702) no later than 4:00 p.m. Wednesday, July 18, 2018.

rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE MARION L. FRANCOIS LIVING TRUST
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion To Compel Respondent Carol Francois To Comply With Demand For Production Of Documents, And For Award Of Monetary Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: The motion to compel production of documents is denied, and no sanctions are awarded. Documents have been provided, and respondent began making good faith arrangements to complete the production before the motion was filed. Any party wishing to contest this tentative ruling by appearing at the scheduled hearing must so advise opposing parties and the courtroom clerk (415-551-3702) no later than 4:00 p.m. Wedndesday, July 18, 2018.

rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE MARION L. FRANCOIS LIVING TRUST
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Compliance With Demand For Inspection Of 20 Taraval Street, San Francisco, California, And For Award Of Monetary Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: The motion to compel an inspection of the property is granted. One attorney, one petitioner, and one expert, must be allowed to enter and inspect the property at issue at a mutually agreeable time within the next 15 days. The Court finds the purpose of inspection sufficiently relevant and overrules respondent's objections to inspection. Sanctions are awarded in the amount of $600 to compensate for reasonable fees and costs incurred in bringing this motion. Any party wishing to contest this tentative ruling by appearing at the scheduled hearing must so advise other parties and the courtroom clerk (415-551-3702) no later than 4:00 p.m. Wednesday, July 18, 2018.
